tomato late blight.info: Late blight is a serious fungal disease affecting tomato plants.
tomato late blight.symptoms: Dark brown spots on leaves, white mold under leaves.
tomato late blight.cure: Apply copper-based fungicide. Remove infected plants.
tomato late blight.fertilizer: Use potassium-rich fertilizer. Avoid excess nitrogen.
tomato late blight.prevention: Avoid overhead watering and ensure air circulation.

tomato leaf mold.info: Leaf mold occurs in humid conditions, mainly in tomatoes.
tomato leaf mold.symptoms: Yellow spots on upper leaf surface, mold underneath.
tomato leaf mold.prevention: Grow resistant varieties and ventilate greenhouse.

potato early blight.info: Early blight is a fungal disease affecting potato leaves.
potato early blight.cure: Remove infected leaves and apply fungicide.

உருளைக்கிழங்கு எர்லி பிளைட்.cure: பாதிக்கப்பட்ட இலைகளை அகற்றி பூஞ்சை மருந்து பயன்படுத்தவும்.
